name: Omai Gold Mines Corp.
description: Omai Gold Mines Corp. is a Canadian gold exploration and development company focused on its 100%-owned Omai Gold Project in mining-friendly Guyana, South America. The project hosts two adjacent orogenic gold deposits, the Wenot shear-hosted open pit and the Gilt Creek intrusion-hosted underground deposit. With a significant mineral resource estimate, the company is actively drilling to expand these deposits. The Omai property is a brownfields site with existing infrastructure, having historically produced over 3.7 million ounces of gold, and the company is currently advancing the project through updated resource estimates and ongoing economic assessments.
